product_name: Art Lab by Canal Toys Fluffy Puffy Paint Studio

bullets: a creative workshop to make cute, colorful paintings with 3D effects with Fluffy paint and decorations

A double technique for even more fun: start by painting the background of the poster with watercolor paints, then apply the Fluffy paint on the recommended areas for a stunning 3D effect and texture. Select different color and decorating tips to add textures to your picture. Preprinted color pictures are included
Choose one of the paint tips to vary the effects, then add decorations for an even more details and color
an easy and fun art activity, ideal for kids 8 and up
For budding artists, this complete studio is a great birthday or holiday gift idea for painting with a textured twist!
content.description: Fluffy paint adds depth to your art creations! It applies like cream and dries adding texture and 3D effect. Add in decorations for a colorful and fun way to bring your artwork to life. The Fluffy Paint Studio is a complete creative workshop to learn how to make original works with 3D effects. Thanks to the dual technique of water painting and relief painting, children can express their imagination and create unique posters. This set contains everything you need to start the activity: water-based painting, Fluffy paint, tips, decorations… It allows you to easily create up to 10 colorful posters. The perfect gift to stimulate creativity while having fun.

attributes.whats_in_box:
1 Fluffy Paint Studio workstation
4 Tubes of Fluffy Paints
4 Interchangeable Decorating Tips
4 Colors of Watercolor Paints
1 Brush
1 Mini Spoon
7 Decoration Packs
10 Printed Posters
10 White Poster Sheets
Instructions
